repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: National Alliance on Mental Illness - Finger Lakes Records

origination.label: creator
origination.corpname: National Alliance on Mental Illness - Finger Lakes

did.abstract: Educational and publicity materials and files on meetings and activities of FLAMI and NAMI-Finger Lakes.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: ORGANIZATIONAL HISTORY
bioghist.p: Under the name Finger Lakes Alliance on Mental Illness (FLAMI) since 1985 and National Alliance on Mental Illness (NAMI)- Finger Lakes since it incorporated as a 501c organization in 2006, this group has organized support for and education about having family members and friends with mental illness.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Educational and publicity materials and files on meetings and activities of FLAMI and NAMI-Finger Lakes, arranged basically chronologically, with audiocassettes and ephemera separate at the end.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: National Alliance on Mental Illness - Finger Lakes Records, #6956. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
